reviews.review_description:
I can simply climb up any wall with just hand grab. There's a mid-arrival points and a decent hurdle, but maybe it's still early level, so I just could go up quickly without hesitating. A parachute drop from the rooftop was a nice experience. And it's great to hear the background music that dev made by himself. It's also quite fitness-wise as I did playing with a lot of fun.
However, it would be more realistic if it showed a little more detailed and sophisticated graphics.
Enjoyed the climbing getting a work out. Stretch the arms out swinging to the next location, climb the aerial lift and back to climbing the building fast enough to get to the next spot!.
Im not impressed but i did enjoy it even more since it was not expensive, really fun and made me sweat a lot
Really cool climbing game with attention to details into a proper city!
My arms are getting a good workout.  I really like the climbing!
Excellent gameplay and environments and mechanics.the climbing feels nature and the extra tools like the parachute and hang glider make movement really fun.it’s great VR experience
levels keep getting taller and harder which makes every run feel like a real challenge. the music also keeps the rhythm while climbing.
climbing huge structures while balancing on pipes feels intense. definitely makes your arms work and keeps you focused the whole time.
cool futuristic city and dangerous heights. climbing while synthwave music plays makes the experience feel very unique.

Really worth buying this one if you like the free skyscraper climbing ! This one has many levels and it's always higher and different, you never get bored! You have to climb here amd there with different architecture!
